title: Armory
description: A mod that adds many weapons, including a scythe, glaive, and more.
body:
# Armory

### Currently Adds

Daggers, scythes, longswords, & several enchantments

### Coming Soon

One-off weapons like the trident & mace, more enchantments, etc.

## Devlog

- This mod is **borderline abandoned**. I do hope to pick it back up at some point, but it is effectively in the lowest tier of my priority list. Sorry :/
  - Mercury, 29-9-25
- Heh I lied, it was not at BlanketCon. Stripped down version out now :)
  - Mercury, 22-5-25
- Okay turns out this is bigger than I expected, but it *will* be at BlanketCon (~ a month).
  - Mercury, 5-3-25
- Armory is undergoing a complete rewrite from scratch for the 2.0.0 update; it will be released within the month, and will be for Fabric 1.21.1; moving away from 1.19.2 and 1.20.1 in general.
  - Mercury, 9-12-24
- New update soon, y'all! Armory 2.0.0 will release within the week, hopefully.
  - Mercury, 20-10-24
